headline: Payrolls Reset The Fed Debate

headline: Digital Realty Trust Stock: Is DLR Underperforming the Real Estate Sector?
summary: Digital Realty Trust has underperformed the broader real estate sector over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
